title: ageratina oaxacana
intro: Ageratina oaxacana, also known as Hierba de San Miguel, is a plant species native to Mexico, belonging to the mint family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help to alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues and digestive problems. The health benefits of Ageratina oaxacana include its potential to reduce fever, relieve pain, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by infusing its leaves in hot water to create a tea, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
